rules.rule_text:
title: NTFS Alternate Data Stream
id: 8c521530-5169-495d-a199-0a3a881ad24e
status: test
description: Detects writing data into NTFS alternate data streams from powershell.
  Needs Script Block Logging.
references:
- https://web.archive.org/web/20220614030603/http://www.powertheshell.com/ntfsstreams/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1564.004/T1564.004.md
author: Sami Ruohonen
date: 2018-07-24
modified: 2022-12-25
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1564.004
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_script
  definition: 'Requirements: Script Block Logging must be enabled'
detection:
  selection_content:
    ScriptBlockText|contains:
    - set-content
    - add-content
  selection_stream:
    ScriptBlockText|contains: -stream
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
